message:
⚡ Stream Trestle card data progressively with parallel cluster checks (#2564)

Parallel cluster checks via Promise.allSettled instead of sequential
for-loop. Card shows results as each cluster completes rather than
blocking behind a spinner until all finish. Adds cluster progress
counter (X/Y checked) visible during initial load.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
